description: A returning user who prefers direct communication. They have an established context_summary and onboarding_done=true. The AI should reference what it knows, be concise, and not be overly effusive.

user_profile.context_summary: Marcus is a 32-year-old product manager who often feels overwhelmed by competing priorities at work. He values practical reflection over emotional processing. He has mentioned difficulty sleeping and a tendency to ruminate on unfinished tasks.

conversation_history.content: Rough week again. The project deadline moved up and I barely slept.

evaluation_criteria.expected_tone: direct, empathetic but concise — acknowledges the stress without being overly emotional or wordy
must_not_include: I'm so sorry to hear that
